title: suttonia lanaiensis
intro: Suttonia lanaiensis, also known as the Hawaiian suttonia, is a rare and unique plant species native to the islands of Hawaii. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Suttonia lanaiensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, making it a promising candidate for the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Suttonia lanaiensis can be made into topical creams or ointments, which are often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, and may also be consumed as a dietary supplement in capsule or tea form.
